title: Worker exposure and employment security
sourceIndicatorId: MoSPI PLFS 2023-24 worker status + ILOSTAT SDG 8.3.1 informality

rows.label: Self-employed
rows.note: PLFS 2023-24, usual status, share of workers

rows.label: Casual labour
rows.note: PLFS 2023-24, usual status, share of workers

rows.label: Regular wage/salaried
rows.note: PLFS 2023-24, usual status, share of workers

rows.label: Informal employment
rows.note: ILOSTAT SDG 8.3.1, total informal employment rate

rows.label: Informal agriculture
rows.note: ILOSTAT SDG 8.3.1, informal employment rate in agriculture

metadata.method: Combines latest PLFS worker-status shares with latest ILOSTAT informal-employment rates to contextualize heat exposure at work.
metadata.caveat: PLFS worker status and ILOSTAT informality are different measures and years. Read each bar independently; do not add them.
